title: dioon edule subsp. angustifolium
intro: Dioon edule subsp. angustifolium is a rare subspecies of the Dioon edule cycad, a plant native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and reducing the risk of certain diseases, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by drying and grinding its leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules.
